title: astragalus neyshaburensis
intro: Astragalus neyshaburensis, also known as the Neyshabur milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family native to Iran. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Astragalus neyshaburensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Astragalus neyshaburensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
